name: Ma Dai | Shu
description:
The jovial warrior of Xiliang.

Dynasty Warriors version.

~

Hide it behind a smile and a tip of the hat.

~

I think it’s lowkey kinda criminal that Ma Dai and Liu Shan don’t get to be buddies because they’re literally just happy people who would secretly commit a lot of murder if they needed to

Mild warnings for how this is literally taking place in a brutal, sexist, chaotic wartime period.
creator: Clementine00
